roa.docketEntryComment: CONFIDENTIAL APD Motion to Notice the Court of Deft's Custodial Status Pur 1203,2a pc
People's Motion to Add to Calendar to Recall a Bench Warrant issued 05/12/2022, Terminate Probation as Unsuccessful.
DEFT ATC MOT TO RECALL BENCH WARRANT FILED
/CAL:APD MTR FILING/X:CLERK ANGEVIC AGDEPPA/FTRRECORDED/X:APD MOTION TOREVOKE DATED 05-12-22/NP/X:JUDGE DEKREON AND DA IN COURTROOM/X:PD VIA ZOOM/FTA/PROB ADM REV/BWI/BAIL:5000/BWNUM:1ST/
/CAL: SENTENCE/TWS/CH1:ISS:PROB 1 Y:PJ 17 D   /CTS: 17  /VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/SUSFF/SA1: WAYNE VANLIEU/SAORD3/SAORD/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/X: SDT RECORDS RELEASED TO DA/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/DEF:APPEARED VIA ZOOM,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OFALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:01-27-22/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIALMONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:TO DO HOME DETENTION/WEAP/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA1:WAGNE VANLIEU/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD:PREHEARING CONF, RELIMINARY HEARING/TE:90 MINS/DOP/
/CAL: DEFENANT MOTION TO RECALL BW/X: OFF CALENDAR, NO BENCH WARRANT/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/MISDRED1: 001/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST &CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 001/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X: FUTURE DATE IS CONFIRMED/
